description: Manage Google Play Console: releases, listings, monetization, reviews, and Android Vitals.
name: io.github.wiseappsai/play-console-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Inline Google service-account key JSON (recommended). Alternatively set GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS to a key file path.
environmentVariables.name: PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON

environmentVariables.description: Path to a Google service-account key file (alternative to PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Numeric Play developer account id. Required only for the `users` (permissions) toolset.
environmentVariables.name: PLAY_DEVELOPER_ACCOUNT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated toolsets to enable, or 'all'. Toolsets: releases, store_listing, monetization, commerce, reviews, users, devices, advanced, vitals, workflows.
environmentVariables.name: PLAY_TOOLSETS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose only read-only actions.
environmentVariables.name: PLAY_READ_ONLY
